location.heading: 3 Ways AI-Generated Content Will Change the eLearning Industry

findings.sentence: You might have seen those [AI videos](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QiiSAvKJIHo) doing the rounds, the ones that have people dropping their jaws in awe at the sight of them.

location.heading: 1\. Course translation: Remove the language barriers

findings.sentence: Research shows that [72 percent of consumers](https://hbr.org/2012/08/speak-to-global-customers-in-t) prefer products with information in their own language.

meta.anchor: create the same video with multiple languages

location.heading: 1\. Course translation: Remove the language barriers

findings.sentence: It has the power to [create the same video with multiple languages](https://www.bbc.com/news/av/technology-46104437), as if each language was uniquely filmed for its audience.

meta.anchor: estimated that a one-hour e-learning course takes between 90 to 240 hours

findings.sentence: It’s [estimated that a one-hour e-learning course takes between 90 to 240 hours](https://www.leadinglearning.com/cost-to-create-e-learning/) to develop, with a whole course costing around £8,000.
[AI-generated content](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=279qKem3mao) drastically cuts down both time and cost, thanks to virtual presenters.

meta.anchor: inserts the recording into the original studio footage

findings.sentence: The tech takes any new video made by a presenter - no matter where they’re located and what they’re wearing - and seamlessly [inserts the recording into the original studio footage](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=smoniOSFbKM).
